2603.18655.title: Multiscale Switch for Semi-Supervised and Contrastive Learning in Medical Ultrasound Image Segmentation
2603.18655.paper_summary: Medical ultrasound image segmentation faces significant challenges due to limited labeled data and characteristic imaging artifacts including speckle noise and low-contrast boundaries. While semi-supervised learning (SSL) approaches have emerged to address data scarcity, existing methods suffer from suboptimal unlabeled data utilization and lack robust feature representation mechanisms. In this paper, we propose Switch, a novel SSL framework with two key innovations: (1) Multiscale Switch (MSS) strategy that employs hierarchical patch mixing to achieve uniform spatial coverage; (2) Frequency Domain Switch (FDS) with contrastive learning that performs amplitude switching in Fourier space for robust feature representations. Our framework integrates these components within a teacher-student architecture to effectively leverage both labeled and unlabeled data. Comprehensive evaluation across six diverse ultrasound datasets (lymph nodes, breast lesions, thyroid nodules, and prostate) demonstrates consistent superiority over state-of-the-art methods. At 5\% labeling ratio, Switch achieves remarkable improvements: 80.04\% Dice on LN-INT, 85.52\% Dice on DDTI, and 83.48\% Dice on Prostate datasets, with our semi-supervised approach even exceeding fully supervised baselines. The method maintains parameter efficiency (1.8M parameters) while delivering superior performance, validating its effectiveness for resource-constrained medical imaging applications. The source code is publicly available at https://github.com/jinggqu/Switch
2603.18655.paper_summary_zh: 醫學超聲影像分割面臨重大挑戰，這是由於標記數據有限以及特徵影像伪影，包括斑點噪聲和低對比邊界。雖然半監督學習（SSL）方法已經出現以解決數據稀缺問題，但現有方法在未標記數據的利用上表現不佳，並且缺乏穩健的特徵表示機制。在本文中，我們提出了Switch，一個新穎的SSL框架，具有兩個關鍵創新：（1）多尺度Switch（MSS）策略，利用分層補丁混合來實現均勻的空間覆蓋；（2）頻域Switch（FDS）與對比學習，這在傅立葉空間中進行幅度切換以獲得穩健的特徵表示。我們的框架將這些組件整合在一個教師-學生架構中，以有效利用標記和未標記數據。在六個不同的超聲數據集（淋巴結、乳腺病變、甲狀腺結節和前列腺）上的全面評估顯示，與最先進的方法相比，表現出一致的優越性。在5\%標記比例下，Switch實現了顯著的改進：在LN-INT上達到80.04\%的Dice，在DDTI上達到85.52\%的Dice，在前列腺數據集上達到83.48\%的Dice，我們的半監督方法甚至超過了完全監督的基準。該方法保持了參數效率（1.8M參數），同時提供了卓越的性能，驗證了其在資源受限的醫療影像應用中的有效性。源代碼可在https://github.com/jinggqu/Switch公開獲得。
2603.18655.author: Jingguo Qu et.al.
2603.18655.authors: Jingguo Qu, Xinyang Han, Yao Pu, Man-Lik Chui, Simon Takadiyi Gunda, Ziman Chen, Jing Qin, Ann Dorothy King, Winnie Chiu-Wing Chu, Jing Cai, Michael Tin-Cheung Ying
